STANDALONE

Short Squeeze Radar

$99/mo
  • Twice daily: 6:30 AM + 12:30 PM EST
  • Short interest >20% of float scan
  • Low float + high days-to-cover
  • Options gamma ramp detection
  • Squeeze Score 1-10 (alerts on 6+)
  • Social volume & borrow utilization
